title: thelypteris assurgens
intro: Thelypteris assurgens, also known as the resurrection fern, is a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, characterized by its unique ability to survive in a desiccated state and revive when exposed to water. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Thelypteris assurgens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in tinctures and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
